column1: # Seize the Seas — LOOT MASTER (founder 2026-07-01 settled model
# Ties the THREE loot dimensions together:
#   (1) CORE      = creature TYPE/SUBTYPE -> GUARANTEED signature good  (loot-signatures.js resolveSignature)
#   (2) SECONDARY = CR BAND (tier=value) + AREA/biome (theme) -> general tier pool  (roll-charts.js resolveSecondary)
#   (3) secondChance% = the HIDDEN chance the SECONDARY ALSO fires
# Players NEVER see odds/dice — only "you won by skill
column2: see what treasure you find" + the goods that paid.
